concept_candidates.label: GolfTournament
concept_candidates.description: A professional golf tournament, a type of sports competition typically held on a golf course featuring 9 or 18 holes.
concept_candidates.justification: The candidate represents a reusable event type that is general enough to be used across multiple documents and aligns with existing ontology classes such as sports competition.
